Phase 1 design flow
~0.22 MGD · stub for 0.5
Confirm lab R&D demand with LANL ops (0.1–0.5 GPD/SF). Greywater reuse cuts landscape 40–60%. Size Santa Fe main for full build-out 2–5 MGD.
